Uses of Enum Class
net.sourceforge.plantuml.core.DiagramType

Packages that use DiagramType
Package
Description
net.atmp
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml
Contains classes for processing PlantUML source files.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.abel
Provides classes used to manage Entity.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.api
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.classdiagram
Provides classes used to manage Class Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.classdiagram.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.command
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML End User Common Commands.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.core
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.cruise
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.dot
Provides classes used to manage Graphviz dot for layout engine.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.eggs
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Easter Eggs.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.jsondiagram
Provides classes used to manage JSON Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.sprite
Provides classes used to manage Sprite.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.objectdiagram
Provides classes used to manage Object (object, map, json) Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.skin
Provides classes used to manage Skin and Skinparameter.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.style
Provides classes used to manage Style.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.svek
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Svek Architecture.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.syntax
Provides classes used to manage Syntax and Language (use to print language, and 'obfuscate').
